notes: Open-source PicoRV32 tiny-SoC full-core harness with real local instruction/data memory and matched baseline/COPPER top modules. This is not production ARM, OoO, silicon, or signoff evidence. Scanned research/rtl/fullcore, research/rtl/integration, and external/picorv32. The PicoRV32 tiny-SoC full-core harness is the open-source full_core target; the older NOP tie-off PicoRV32 wrapper remains accepted_core_wrapper only.

Open-source PicoRV32 tiny-SoC full-core harness with real local instruction/data memory and matched baseline/COPPER top modules. This is not production ARM, OoO, silicon, or signoff evidence. Scanned research/rtl/fullcore, research/rtl/integration, and external/picorv32. The PicoRV32 tiny-SoC full-core harness is the open-source full_core target; the older NOP tie-off PicoRV32 wrapper remains accepted_core_wrapper only.
Accepted PicoRV32 core-wrapper fallback with real PicoRV32 RTL plus wrapper/prefetch sources. This is stronger than a stub but is not the target true full-core integration.
